description_long: This house complex features a mix of industrial and residential architectural elements, with two prominent tall smokestacks rising from a large brick building. The property is enclosed by a brick wall and includes a driveway with parked cars, a landscaped garden area with trees and grass, and multiple interconnected structures. The main building has large arched windows and a flat roof, while an adjacent section features a pitched roof and a modern, angular canopy. The grounds are well-maintained, with paved walkways, a small pool or water feature, and various entry points. The overall design suggests a converted industrial facility repurposed for residential use, blending utilitarian and contemporary styles.
description: A large, enclosed house complex with industrial smokestacks, brick walls, landscaped gardens, and multiple interconnected buildings featuring both flat and pitched roofs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main building with two tall smokestacks, arched windows, and the driveway with cars and a gated entrance.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the brick building, the smokestacks, and the landscaped garden area with trees and grass.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pitched-roof structure, additional greenery, and the back side of the main brick building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the full extent of the property, including the garden, pool, and the arrangement of all buildings within the brick enclosure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large arched windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a gated drive, large industrial-style doors, and minimal decorative elements, emphasizing function over ornamentation.
